tagline: From a Squarespace site, a Google Sheet roster and a tray of paper receipts — to one branded HQ.
before: Square POS, takings in a sheet
integrated: New site with online ordering & booking
Staff app for shifts, holidays, tips
Supplier ordering — one button per supplier
Live takings + costs dashboard for the owner
ai: AI receptionist that handles bookings & FAQs over WhatsApp
Auto-replies to Google reviews in their voice (with owner approval)
Weekly menu performance summary in plain English
Smart inventory: suggests reorders before you run out
quote: I used to spend Sundays catching up on emails, the till and shift swaps. Now it's all in one place — I get my weekends back.

tagline: Replaced 6 tools (booking, reminders, files, intake, payments, comms) with one calm patient portal.
integrated: Digital intake forms with allergy/history checks
Treatment plans + estimates with one-click payment
ai: Pre-appointment AI that answers nervous patient questions 24/7
Auto-summary of intake forms — surfacing risks to the dentist
Recall AI: gently nudges patients due for check-ups in their preferred channel
Internal 'ask the SOP' agent for the front desk team
quote: Front desk has stopped drowning. Patients arrive prepared. We've recovered 30+ hours a month between two practices.

tagline: Job sheets on WhatsApp, quotes in a notebook, customers chasing for updates. Not anymore.
before: Customer calls for ETAs all day
Lost time to admin every evening
integrated: Branded customer site with instant quote estimator
Mobile field-app for engineers — jobs, photos, signatures
Auto SMS to customer when engineer is on the way
Quote → job → invoice → payment, all linked
Live dashboard for the owner (jobs today, revenue, parts)
ai: AI quote drafter: customer describes the problem, gets a sensible estimate range
AI dispatcher: suggests which engineer + when, factoring travel & skill
Voice-to-job-note: engineer talks, AI fills the job sheet
Review request flows triggered automatically after a job completes
quote: I stopped doing paperwork at 9pm. Quotes go out the same hour. Customers think we've doubled in size.

tagline: Replaced Kajabi + Teachable + Notion + Calendly + ConvertKit with one branded student portal.
integrated: Branded student portal with course player
ai: An AI coach trained on the founder's frameworks — students ask anytime
Personalised next-step recommendations after each lesson
Auto-grader for written assignments with detailed feedback
Content multiplier: turns each podcast into 8 short clips + a newsletter
quote: I cancelled £400/mo of SaaS. My students are more active. The AI coach has saved me 10+ DM hours a week.

tagline: From Shopify + Klaviyo + Gorgias + ManyChat duct-tape — to a unified storefront with AI baked in.
integrated: Headless Shopify storefront — fast, editorial, mobile-first
Connected reviews, UGC and product Q&A
Single customer view across site, email, support
ai: AI product stylist: 'what goes with this?'
Support agent answering 70% of tickets (returns, sizing, shipping)
Ad creative generator using brand-approved templates
Personal subject-line writer for every Klaviyo campaign
Visual search: shoppers upload an image, see closest products
quote: Customer support cost halved. Conversion up 28%. We finally have time to design the next collection.

tagline: Sticky-notes, Trainerize, MyFitnessPal, Insta DMs — into one branded member app.
ai: AI form-check: members upload a video, AI flags posture issues
Personalised weekly check-in survey + AI-summarised report to the trainer
Nutrition coach AI tailored to the member's goal & allergens
Auto-generated celebratory milestones (PRs, streaks) for social sharing
quote: Retention has never been this high. Members say it feels like having a coach in their pocket.

tagline: Whiteboard drills, WhatsApp video reviews, payments in PayPal — to a branded coaching platform parents trust.
integrated: Drill & technique video library, tagged by skill
ai: AI video analysis: upload match clip → tagged moments (shots, passes, defensive errors)
Personalised drill plan per player based on their game footage
Parent-friendly progress reports auto-written from session notes
Smart scheduling AI that solves clashes across 40+ players
Voice-to-note: coach speaks after a session, AI writes the report
quote: Parents see real progress on paper, players love the videos, and I get my Sunday evenings back.

tagline: Canva, Midjourney, Etsy ads, Pinterest — endless tabs and burnt creative hours. Now a branded creator HQ.
before: Midjourney for design ideas (£100s wasted on bad prompts)
integrated: Branded creator dashboard: listings, sales, costs
Bulk listing tool (Etsy + own site + Pinterest at once)
Customer support inbox (Etsy convos + email + Insta DMs unified)
ai: Branded design-prompt app: type a phrase → on-brand product mockup, first try
Etsy SEO assistant: paste a listing → keywords, title, tags, alt text — optimised
Ad creative generator using your brand colours + winning angles
Pinterest pin writer + scheduler in your voice
AI customer service drafting replies to common questions
quote: I used to spend 3 hours getting one product image right. Now it takes 5 minutes and looks better. The keyword AI alone changed everything.

tagline: Email-based client chasing, lost PDFs, deadline panic. Replaced with a calm client portal + AI deadline guardian.

integrated: Branded client portal — secure document upload, e-sign
Deadline tracker — HMRC / Companies House / VAT

AI 'first-draft' tax computation reviewer flagging anomalies
Client question bot — answers FAQs (allowable expenses, deadlines, etc.) 24/7 in your firm's tone
AI deadline guardian — chases clients via SMS/email in increasing urgency
Annual report writer that pulls from the client's data
quote: Deadline season went from chaos to calm. Clients send receipts in seconds, and the AI catches what my juniors miss.

tagline: Rightmove, Zoopla, three CRMs, 20 spreadsheets of viewings. Unified into one branded property platform.

integrated: Branded property portal (with their own AVM tool)

Auto-written property descriptions (in your tone) from photos + bullet facts

Feedback summariser: vendor sees themed comments after every viewing
After-viewing follow-up emails personalised per buyer's reactions
